articles.title: The Core Ultra 7 270K was too good, so Intel scrapped the flagship Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — benchmarks of the 290K prototype find slim 2% faster performance in gaming and applications
articles.summary: The Core Ultra 9 290K Plus, which never came out, was only marginally faster than the Core Ultra 7 270K Plus, which explains why Intel ultimately chose not to release it. On average across 1080p and 1440p games, it's only about 2% faster, and in synthetic benchmarks and productivity workloads, it's less than 4% ahead.
articles.title_zh: Core Ultra 7 270K 表現太強，Intel 取消旗艦 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — 290K 原型機基準測試顯示遊戲和應用效能僅快 2%
articles.summary_zh: 從未發售的 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus 相比 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 效能提升有限，平均遊戲效能僅快約 2%，這解釋了 Intel 最終決定不發布該產品的原因。

articles.title: These are the best new MacBook deals right now: May 2026 Buyer’s Guide
articles.summary: In the era of Apple Silicon, MacBooks are more affordable than ever. Nowadays, you can buy a MacBook Air with 512GB of storage and 16GB of memory for $1099 directly from Apple, when such a configuration would’ve cost $1599 just a few years ago. And on top of that, we have MacBook Neo bringing the entry-point down substantially. Even with Apple’s prices coming down though, there’s still a number of deals to be found out there if you look just a little. more…
articles.title_zh: 現在最好的 MacBook 優惠：2026年5月買家指南
articles.summary_zh: 在 Apple Silicon 時代，MacBook 變得前所未有的平價；現在可直接從 Apple 購買配備 512GB 儲存和 16GB 記憶體的 MacBook Air，售價僅 $1099，而數年前同樣配置需要 $1599。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Cats Lock’ is a fun Mac app that solves cat keyboard spam
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . If you’re a beloved cat owner, you might often have your cat running across your Mac’s keyboard, causing loads of unnecessary keyboard input, and sometimes even unwanted communications. Cats Lock has a solution for it, and soon your cat will be able to roam your MacBook keyboard freely. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：'Cats Lock' 是解決貓咪鍵盤亂踩的趣味 Mac 應用
articles.summary_zh: Cats Lock 是 Indie App Spotlight 系列的週間精選應用；如果你是貓咪飼主，可能經常遇到貓咪在 Mac 鍵盤上亂走導致的問題。

articles.title: Apple Watch Series 12: Here’s what we know so far
articles.summary: As is the case every year, this September – Apple will be unveiling its next-generation Apple Watch model. Apple Watch Series 12 will likely carry on the same design language as the Apple Watch Series 11, but with a few changes. Let’s dive in. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Watch Series 12：目前我們所知的情報
articles.summary_zh: Apple Watch Series 12 預計將於今年9月發佈，可能延續 Apple Watch Series 11 的設計語言但會有若干改進。

articles.title: How to remove your personal data from the internet (and why you can’t afford to wait)
articles.summary: Data brokers make a living by selling your personal information for profit. Your phone number, email, home address, and Social Security number could be packaged and sold to spammers, scammers, and identity thieves right now. Your privacy loss is their gain. Apple’s privacy protections can help block some but not all tracking as data harvesting efforts become increasingly sophisticated. If you want to proactively and continuously remove your personal data from broker databases, Incogni makes it easier than ever to fight back and regain control of your privacy. more…
articles.title_zh: 如何從網際網路上移除你的個人資料（以及為什麼你不能再等待）
articles.summary_zh: 資料仲介靠販售你的個人資訊牟利，你的電話號碼、電子郵件、住址和社會安全號碼可能現在就被打包出售給垃圾郵件發送者、詐騙犯和身分盜竊者。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [May 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 新增功能推出情況 [2026年5月]
articles.summary_zh: 與其他 Google 應用類似，Messages for Android 進行許多 A/B 測試；RCS/SMS 客戶端推出新功能的時間通常較長。

articles.title: Wondering where your OxygenOS update is? OnePlus quietly hit pause
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR OnePlus has paused the rollout of OxygenOS version 16.0.7.XXX and 16.0.5.XXX. The rollout was paused due to devices experiencing abnormal restart and boot issues. The rollout will resume after the issue is fixed and the builds are validated for stability and reliability. OnePlus recently began rolling out an OxygenOS update. If you’re wondering why it’s still not available for your OnePlus device, it’s because the rollout was paused. However, it shouldn’t be long before the rollout resumes. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 想知道你的 OxygenOS 更新在哪？OnePlus 悄悄暫停了推出
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus 已暫停 OxygenOS 版本 16.0.7.XXX 和 16.0.5.XXX 的推出，因為設備出現異常重啟和啟動問題。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Motorola Razr 70 / 2026 series is overpriced, needs more updates
articles.summary: Last week, we asked you to vote on the topic of Motorola’s new flip foldables – the Razr 70 series or, as they are known in the US, the Razr 2026 series. While there are three models involved, we can come to only one conclusion. And that conclusion is that the new flip foldables are too expensive – each of the three (vanilla, plus and Ultra) has its fans, however, it would take a price cut or some other deal before most people would consider buying one. Let’s look at them individually. The Motorola Razr 70 Ultra (aka Razr Ultra 2026) has the best shot – 15% of the vote went in its favor...
articles.title_zh: 週投票結果：Motorola Razr 70 / 2026 系列價格過高，需要更多更新
articles.summary_zh: 上週投票結果顯示，Motorola 新款折疊式手機 Razr 70 系列（美國稱為 Razr 2026 系列）的價格過於昂貴。

articles.title: Google’s new Gemini Intelligence will only be available on a handful of the best current Android flagships for now
articles.summary: A few days ago, Google announced Gemini Intelligence, which seems to be more than just a rebranding effort. It’s actually an impressive set of features that, among other things, can automate multi-step tasks and execute them entirely in the background on its own, including things like sourcing and transforming information and interacting with various apps and websites autonomously on your behalf. There is even a “Rambler” component coming to Gboard that lets you talk freely with any and all filler or crutch words that most of us unintentionally use, and even mix languages in the same...
articles.title_zh: Google 新推出的 Gemini Intelligence 目前僅限部分頂級 Android 旗艦機使用
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣佈的 Gemini Intelligence 不僅是重新命名，而是一套令人印象深刻的功能集合，可自動執行多步驟任務並在背景獨立運行。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A54 starts receiving May 2026 security patches before its flagship siblings
articles.summary: This is a rather interesting development for sure, but for whatever reason, Samsung has already shipped an update containing Android’s May security patches to the Galaxy A55 and is now doing the same for the Galaxy A54. Meanwhile, this author’s personal Galaxy S26 Ultra is still running patches from April 5 as of writing this article. We snooped around in the changelog for the update just out of curiosity. Perhaps something in there would simply be more relevant in some way to the midrange Galaxy A5x family? That doesn’t appear to be the case. The May patches address two critical...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A54 在旗艦機之前率先收到 2026年5月安全補丁
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已向 Galaxy A55 推送包含 Android 5月安全補丁的更新，現在也開始為 Galaxy A54 提供同樣更新。

articles.title: Weekly deals: the Galaxy S26 series is on sale, Motorola Razr 2026 series goes on pre-order
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26+ (256GB) is currently $890 on Amazon – that’s a bit lower than we’ve seen it at for the past few weeks and $200+ off on a phone that’s less than three months old is a solid discount. That said, the 2026 model doesn’t bring many updates over its predecessor – there’s the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 and the slightly faster wireless charging (20W vs. 15W, though still without magnets). Meanwhile, many flagship features are still missing, things like a high resolution sensor in the telephoto camera, 10-bit colors for the display or an IP69 rating (though that last one is...
articles.title_zh: 週間優惠：Galaxy S26 系列降價，Motorola Razr 2026 系列開放預訂
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26+ (256GB) 目前在 Amazon 售價 $890，比近數週價格更低，對於發售不足三個月的新機來說優惠不錯。

articles.title: Google reveals why it's offering only 5GB free storage instead of 15GB with some new Gmail accounts
articles.summary: We recently saw reports from users claiming that Google is offering only 5GB of free storage with a new Gmail account, instead of 15GB, but if they added their phone number to the new account, Google would "unlock" 15GB storage at no cost. Google has revealed the reason behind that. In a statement to Android Authority, a Google spokesperson said the company is testing this change to help it continue to provide a "high-quality storage service" to its users. New Gmail account with 5GB storage "We’re testing a new storage policy for new accounts created in select regions that will...
articles.title_zh: Google 揭露為何部分新 Gmail 帳戶僅提供 5GB 免費儲存而非 15GB
articles.summary_zh: Google 解釋了為何某些新 Gmail 帳戶只提供 5GB 而非 15GB 的免費儲存；若用戶新增電話號碼，Google 會「解鎖」15GB 免費儲存空間。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 series, Fold6, and Flip6 are receiving One UI 8.5 stable update in the US
articles.summary: The One UI 8.5 stable update released by Samsung for the Galaxy S24 series, Galaxy Z Fold6, and Galaxy Z Flip6 globally earlier this week is now rolling out in the US. [#InlinePriceWidget,13147,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,12771,1#] The update comes with firmware versions S928USQU5DZDR for the Galaxy S24 Ultra, S721USQUBDZDP for the Galaxy S24 FE, F956USQU3DZDQ for the Galaxy Z Fold6, and F741USQU3DZDP for the Galaxy Z Flip6. The One UI 8.5 stable update is also reportedly rolling out in the US for the Galaxy S24 and Galaxy S24+, but their firmware versions aren't known. Samsung...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S24 系列、Fold6 和 Flip6 在美國接收 One UI 8.5 穩定版更新
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S24 系列、Galaxy Z Fold6 和 Galaxy Z Flip6 的 One UI 8.5 穩定版更新已在美國開始推出。

articles.title: Selfie video blind test reveal: the Samsung Galaxy A37 wins a decisive victory
articles.summary: A week ago, we asked you to participate in a selfie video blind test. We lined up five phones, and we let you vote which one had the best selfie video quality. These five phones were not chosen randomly; we picked those specifically because their selfie videos had already surprised us during review time. And you will see what we mean when you see their names. We collected our readers' opinion on the quality of these videos across several platforms, including our TikTok channel, Instagram, YouTube and a poll on our homepage. The winner and the loser are quite clear now – and surprisingly,...
articles.title_zh: 自拍影片盲測揭曉：Samsung Galaxy A37 獲得決定性勝利
articles.summary_zh: 一週前的自拍影片盲測中，我們為五部手機進行投票比較自拍影片質量，Samsung Galaxy A37 最終獲得決定性勝利。

articles.title: Santa Clara County Sues Meta Over Alleged Scam Ads
articles.title_zh: Santa Clara 縣起訴 Meta 涉嫌詐騙廣告

articles.title: ★ AI Is Technology, Not a Product
articles.summary: It’s not even a feature. It’s just technology.
articles.title_zh: ★ AI 是技術，不是產品

articles.title: ArXiv to Ban Researchers for a Year if They Submit AI Slop
articles.title_zh: ArXiv 將禁止提交 AI 垃圾內容的研究人員一年

articles.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
articles.summary: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.
articles.title_zh: AI 淘金熱中的幸運兒與失利者
articles.summary_zh: 儘管在科技產業內，當前 AI 繁榮的氛圍也不甚樂觀。

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
articles.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
articles.title_zh: 研究存儲庫 ArXiv 將禁止讓 AI 完成所有工作的作者一年
articles.summary_zh: ArXiv 正在加強對科學論文中大語言模型草率使用的打擊。

articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
articles.summary: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 聯合創辦人 Greg Brockman 掌管產品策略
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 的最新重組到來之際，該公司據稱計劃整合 ChatGPT 和其編程產品 Codex。

articles.title: ASML Partners With Tata Electronics to Advance India Chip Plans
articles.summary: ASML Holding NV entered into a partnership agreement with Tata Electronics Private Limited aimed at ramping up India’s goal to develop domestic chip-manufacturing capabilities.
articles.title_zh: ASML 與 Tata Electronics 合作推進印度芯片計劃
articles.summary_zh: ASML Holding NV 與 Tata Electronics Private Limited 簽訂合作協議，旨在推進印度發展國內芯片製造能力的目標。

articles.title: AI Poised to Tilt Job Market Leverage Toward Older Workers
articles.summary: When it comes to job cuts, older workers are often disproportionately affected. But a new survey of chief executive officers suggests this won’t be a given as companies adopt artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: AI 可能改變就業市場對年長員工的話語權
articles.summary_zh: 儘管年長員工在裁員中往往受到不成比例的影響，但首席執行官的最新調查表明，隨著企業採用人工智能，這種情況可能不再必然發生。

articles.title: 微軟揭露Exchange Server存在8.1分重大漏洞，並已偵測到漏洞利用活動

articles.title: AI 分析游離 DNA，提早揪出無症狀肝病

articles.title_zh: AI 分析游離 DNA，提早揪出無症狀肝病

articles.title: LinkedIn recruitment spam becomes Olde English prose after user hides AI prompt injection in bio — bots also also manipulated to address user as ‘My Lord’
articles.summary: One LinkedIn user has fought back against recruiter spam in a very unusual way.
articles.title_zh: LinkedIn招聘垃圾訊息變成古英文後，使用者在個人檔案中隱藏AI提示詞注入——機器人也被操縱稱呼使用者為「My Lord」
articles.summary_zh: 一名LinkedIn使用者以非常不尋常的方式對抗招聘人員的垃圾訊息。

articles.title: Russia’s Mikron is selling framed test wafers with up to 120,000 processors as souvenirs — 12 designs, priced around $170 each, sold alongside $2 vials of cleanroom air
articles.summary: Russia’s Mikron is earning a bit of cash on the side by selling picture-framed test wafers as souvenirs with 12 designs to choose from, priced around $170.
articles.title_zh: 俄羅斯Mikron販售裝框測試晶圓作為紀念品，最多包含120,000個處理器——12種設計，每件售價約170美元，並附帶2美元的無塵室空氣小瓶
articles.summary_zh: 俄羅斯Mikron正在銷售裝框的測試晶圓紀念品作為額外收入來源，提供12種設計選擇，售價約170美元。

articles.title: Jay Forrester filed the first practical computer RAM patent 75 years ago this week — his Magnetic Core Memory patent would be granted five years later
articles.summary: Granted as U.S. Patent 2,736,880 in February 1956, Forrester's invention evolved from MIT's Project Whirlwind.
articles.title_zh: Jay Forrester在75年前這一週申請了第一項實用電腦RAM專利——他的磁芯記憶體專利在五年後獲得批准
articles.summary_zh: 該發明於1956年2月獲得美國專利2,736,880，源自MIT的Project Whirlwind項目。

articles.title: Forza Horizon 6 boots up in just 4 seconds instead of 90 with new Advanced Shader Delivery tech and AMD GPUs — Microsoft claims 95% reduction in gaming load times
articles.summary: Microsoft is bringing Advanced Shader Delivery to Windows 11 PCs at large, after introducing the tech on Xbox ROG Ally handhelds last year. The company says you can expect up to 95% faster load times in Forza Horizon 6, for instance, going from 90 seconds to just 4 seconds on initial launch thanks to precompiled shaders.
articles.title_zh: Forza Horizon 6開機時間從90秒縮短至4秒，採用新型Advanced Shader Delivery技術與AMD GPU——Microsoft聲稱遊戲載入時間減少95%
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft在去年Xbox ROG Ally掌機上推出該技術後，現已將Advanced Shader Delivery引入Windows 11 PC，例如在Forza Horizon 6中可期待速度快95倍，從90秒縮至4秒。

articles.title: US FTC reportedly launches antitrust probe into Arm following its launch of its own AGI CPU — regulators investigate if chip designer is restricting architecture access to rivals
articles.summary: The U.S. FTC is looking into Arm Holdings to see if it's abusing its market position as a dominant chip designer to gives its new chip manufacturing business an advantage over competitors who build semiconductors based on Arm designs.
articles.title_zh: 美國FTC據報對Arm啟動反壟斷調查，調查其推出自有AGI CPU後的行為——監管機構調查晶片設計師是否限制競爭對手對架構的存取
articles.summary_zh: 美國FTC正調查Arm Holdings是否濫用其作為主導晶片設計商的市場地位，以便為其新晶片製造業務相對基於Arm設計的半導體製造商提供優勢。

articles.title: Josef Prusa says Bambu Lab allegedly violates AGPL license with an un-auditable network 'black box' — warns Chinese 3D printing software poses massive security risks
articles.summary: While the internet is up in arms over Bambu Lab threatening legal action against an indy OrcaSlicer developer, Josef Prusa once again warns of sheep in wolves' clothing. Prusa, the founder and CEO of Prusa Research and proponent of open source, has often noted that his company is the last Western manufacturer of desktop 3D printers still standing after China began subsidizing manufacturers within its borders.
articles.title_zh: Josef Prusa稱Bambu Lab涉嫌違反AGPL許可證，使用不可審計的網路「黑箱」——警告中國3D列印軟體構成重大安全風險
articles.summary_zh: 在網際網路為Bambu Lab對獨立OrcaSlicer開發者採取法律行動而激怒之際，Josef Prusa再次警告披著羊皮的狼。開源倡導者Prusa多次指出，其公司是最後一家西方製造商。

articles.title: China bypasses US GPU bans with 1.54-exaflops 'LineShine' supercomputer — CPU-only monster packs 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
articles.summary: China's National Supercomputing Center in Shenzhen takes a page from Japan's Fugaku supercomputer and Fujitsu's A64FX processor, build LineShine supercomputer based entirely on Armv9-based LineShine LX2 CPUs.
articles.title_zh: 中國繞過美國GPU禁令，推出1.54艾浮點「LineShine」超級電腦——純CPU怪獸配備240萬華為設計的Armv9核心
articles.summary_zh: 中國深圳國家超級計算中心效仿日本Fugaku超級電腦和富士通A64FX處理器，基於Armv9架構LineShine LX2 CPU構建LineShine超級電腦。

articles.title: OpenClaw creator burned through $1.3 million in OpenAI API tokens in a single month — bill covered 603 billion tokens across 7.6 million requests and 100 coding agents
articles.summary: The bill covered 603 billion tokens across 7.6 million requests, all generated by roughly 100 Codex instances.
articles.title_zh: OpenClaw創建者在單月內花費130萬美元的OpenAI API代幣——帳單涵蓋6030億個代幣，跨越760萬次請求和100個編碼代理
articles.summary_zh: 帳單涵蓋6030億個代幣，跨越760萬次請求，全由約100個Codex實例產生。

articles.title: Taiwan declares itself 'sovereign and independent' after Trump questions US defense commitment — comments come after Trump said he opposes Taiwan independence
articles.summary: The statement came hours after President Donald Trump told Fox News he opposes Taiwan pursuing formal independence.
articles.title_zh: Trump質疑美國防衛承諾後，台灣聲明自己「主權獨立」——Trump曾表示反對台灣獨立
articles.summary_zh: 該聲明在川普告訴Fox News他反對台灣追求正式獨立後數小時發布。

articles.title: Jensen Huang slams 'stupid' analogy comparing GPUs to nuclear weapons — Nvidia CEO says government should allow selling GPUs to 'adversarial countries'
articles.summary: The Nvidia chief said that you cannot compare AI GPUs to nuclear weapons.
articles.title_zh: Jensen Huang砲轰將GPU比作核武器的「愚蠢」類比——Nvidia執行長表示政府應允許向「對抗國家」銷售GPU
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia首席執行官表示不能將AI GPU與核武器進行比較。

articles.title: Maker packs an opinionated, googly-eyed AI chatbot into a mobile suitcase, powered by an Nvidia Jetson — entirely local machine entity runs Gemma 4 E4B and can respond in 200ms
articles.summary: Sparky is an opinionated googly-eyed AI in a suitcase powered by an Nvidia Jetson Orin NS Super 16GB.
articles.title_zh: 製造商將一個固執己見、眼睛圓凸的AI聊天機器人打包進行動公事包，由Nvidia Jetson驅動——完全本地化機器實體運行Gemma 4 E4B，可在200毫秒內回應
articles.summary_zh: Sparky是一個固執己見的眼睛圓凸AI助手，放在由Nvidia Jetson Orin NS Super 16GB驅動的公事包中。

articles.title: Report: Apple to upgrade Genmoji in iOS 27 with new automatic suggestions
articles.summary: According to the Power On newsletter from Mark Gurman , Apple is planning an interesting new Genmoji feature in iOS 27 to bolster its usage: suggested Genmoji’s based on your photo library and keyboard history. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：Apple 計劃在 iOS 27 中升級 Genmoji，新增自動建議功能
articles.summary_zh: 根據 Mark Gurman 的 Power On 電子報，Apple 計劃在 iOS 27 中推出新的 Genmoji 功能，包括基於您的相片庫和鍵盤歷史記錄的建議 Genmoji，以提高其使用率。

articles.title: Standalone Siri app to offer auto-deleting chat history, launch with beta label: report
articles.summary: Next month at WWDC 2026, Apple is expected to finally live up to its AI Siri promises, and more. The company has long been working on a new standalone Siri app to boost how users interact with Siri and Apple Intelligence – and it should be debuting in beta next month. According to a new report from Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman , the new Siri app will come with a privacy feature similar to one on iMessage: auto-deleting chats. He also expects Siri to launch with a beta label even when it’s available publicly in the fall, similar to some previous Apple rollouts. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立 Siri 應用將提供自動刪除聊天記錄，以測試版推出：報告
articles.summary_zh: Apple 預計在下月的 WWDC 2026 上推出獨立 Siri 應用測試版，以增強用戶與 Siri 和 Apple Intelligence 的互動方式。

articles.title: Google’s underrated AI app unlocked 3 amazing on-device AI tools on my Android phone
articles.summary: AI. AI. AI. I’m sure you’re tired of hearing this word over the past couple of years. It is everywhere, slapped onto every feature, every app, every keynote slide, whether it actually makes your phone better or not. And honestly, I’ve felt the same way. Sure, some features are quite useful, but most of the AI features on Android I find to be a gimmick you try once and forget about. One such gimmick, at least in my opinion, has always been on-device AI . Most AI features on our phones still rely on the cloud (or hybrid architecture), and for the longest time, I’ve believed that smartphones simply can’t match the processing power of AI data centers. Because of that, on-device AI never really felt all that useful, at least not to the extent companies claim it is.
articles.title_zh: Google 被低估的 AI 應用在我的 Android 手機上解鎖了 3 個驚人的設備端 AI 工具
articles.summary_zh: 該報導探討了 Google 一款不太知名的 AI 應用如何在 Android 設備上提供實用的設備端 AI 功能。

articles.title: I’m self-hosting a Google Photos alternative on my old Pixel
articles.summary: It’s fair to say that Google Photos has been the best thing that has ever happened to smartphone photography management. For years, it has served as the ultimate set-it-and-forget-it tool. And for the longest time, it was my go-to recommendation. It was practically free. It was unlimited. It was perfect for anyone who didn’t want to think about how to store their photographs in the long run. However, it’s been a while since the party ended and the storage limits kicked in. Suddenly, it’s no longer the obvious choice. Like many others, I’ve also gone down the NAS route and set up my own Google Photos alternative. I’ve experimented with various self-hosted platforms like Immich and my own storage server to forgo the Google Photos tax. But lately, I’ve been thinking of alternative solutions.
articles.title_zh: 我在舊 Pixel 手機上自託管 Google Photos 替代方案
articles.summary_zh: 文章介紹了如何在舊 Pixel 手機上自託管 Google Photos 的替代解決方案。

articles.title: I love WhatsApp, but it desperately needs this feature
articles.summary: Credit: Robert Triggs / Android Authority I add an item to my shopping cart online, go through the checkout process, but then have a last-minute change of heart. I decide not to buy for whatever reason, expecting the story to end there, but it doesn’t. Less than a day later, the company is already messaging me on WhatsApp , asking if they can assist me with anything so I can complete my purchase. Wait a minute, I don’t remember signing up for this!
articles.title_zh: 我喜歡 WhatsApp，但它迫切需要這個功能
articles.summary_zh: 作者討論了 WhatsApp 應該添加的一個重要功能，以改善用戶體驗。

articles.title: If Gemini can do everything for me, what’s the point of Android?
articles.summary: We didn’t see it coming (honestly, neither did Apple), but Google just showcased what could perhaps be the biggest moment for AI: Gemini Intelligence . It brings to reality Gemini’s agentic mode that we have all been dreaming of: where AI can execute multi-step tasks on your behalf as you watch your phone screen do things on its own, as if it were a moving newspaper from a Harry Potter movie. Gemini Intelligence does appear futuristic, and honestly, it is tempting enough that I’d want to try it out. But once you step back away from its dazzle, you realize that it fundamentally changes how we interact with our smartphones. If Gemini can search, plan, compare, reply, and execute tasks on my behalf, where exactly do I come into the process? Do I actively participate, or just hover over its ac
articles.title_zh: 如果 Gemini 能為我做一切，Android 還有什麼用？
articles.summary_zh: Google 展示了 Gemini Intelligence，一個具有代理模式的 AI 功能，可以代表用戶執行多步驟任務。

articles.title: We’re about to witness a critical moment for Google’s smart glasses
articles.summary: Google made plenty of announcements at the Android Show last week, but none captured my attention more than Android XR . The company formalized a roadmap I’ve been waiting for, designed to bring Android XR beyond clunky AR-style goggles into the world of something people actually want to wear. Samsung’s Galaxy XR headset works well, and I enjoyed my time testing it, but there’s no way I’d want to wear a heavy headset for more than a few minutes at a time. It’s also expensive and limited to niche uses — it’s not a vehicle to bring Android XR into the mainstream.
articles.title_zh: 我們即將見證 Google 智能眼鏡的關鍵時刻
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Android Show 上正式推出了 Android XR 路線圖，旨在將 Android XR 引入更實用和美觀的智能眼鏡領域。

articles.title: I spent a week with Walmart’s new $60 Google TV streamer, and I’m already blown away
articles.summary: The Walmart Onn 4K Pro has been one of the most elusive tech gadgets of 2026. The Google TV streaming device has been leaking since March, and for the past month, Walmart has kinda-sorta been rolling it out — with random online listings and store sightings, but no official launch or announcement. I managed to snag the Onn 4K Pro about a week ago and have been using it as my primary streaming device ever since. I wasn’t expecting much from a $60 Google TV box, but after a week of use, Walmart proved me wrong.
articles.title_zh: 我花了一週時間體驗沃爾瑪新推出的 $60 Google TV 串流播放器，我已經被震撼到了
articles.summary_zh: 作者體驗了沃爾瑪 Onn 4K Pro Google TV 串流設備，並對其性能印象深刻。

articles.title: Meta’s Ray-Ban Display gets typing through air gestures in latest update
articles.summary: The Ray-Ban Display – Meta’s flagship smart wearable glasses – the ones with the display overlay and not to be confused with the seemingly more popular camera-only models- are getting quite a significant update. After months in a limited-access beta state within Messenger and WhatsApp, Neural Handwriting is finally available to all. It works on both iOS and Android and across Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger and your phone’s message notifications to search for contacts and to send and reply to messages. Naturally, you do have to be wearing the Neural Band accessory that comes bundled...
articles.title_zh: Meta 的 Ray-Ban Display 在最新更新中支持空中手勢輸入
articles.summary_zh: Meta 的 Ray-Ban Display 智能眼鏡獲得了 Neural Handwriting 功能，允許用戶通過空中手勢進行輸入。

articles.title: Honor MagicBook Pro 14 (2026) review
articles.summary: Introduction Today, we've got the latest in an ever-growing lineup of Honor laptops. This is the Pro model for 2026, and as such, it's pretty cutting-edge, which isn't surprising coming from Honor. It was among the first makers to move to OLED, and it has always used innovative 3:2 screens with high refresh rates. The specs overview is pretty impressive, too. Upfront is a 14.6-inch 3120x2080px OLED touchscreen with a 3:2 aspect ratio and a max refresh rate of 120Hz. Inside is an Intel Core Ultra 5 338H processor with 32GB of RAM. There's 1TB of storage. The laptop is powered by a 92Wh...
articles.title_zh: Honor MagicBook Pro 14 (2026) 評測
articles.summary_zh: 文章評測了 Honor 2026 年推出的最新 MagicBook Pro 14 筆記本，介紹了其前沿的技術特性。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Galaxy S26 Ultra, Pixel 10 Pro, Xiaomi 17 Ultra, and more discounted
articles.summary: This week’s deals feature a mix of familiar phones and a few new arrivals. At this point, it would be more surprising if Samsung’s Galaxy S26 series and Google’s Pixel 10 lineup weren’t on sale. We’ve also got a couple of Xiaomi phones, the Motorola Edge 70, and Samsung’s Galaxy S25 Edge on sale. Just like last week, the Samsung Galaxy S26 and Galaxy S26 Ultra are available at a discount. While the savings are relatively modest, £100 off at checkout is pretty neat for smartphones that have only been on the market for a few months. ...
articles.title_zh: 本週優惠：Galaxy S26 Ultra、Pixel 10 Pro、Xiaomi 17 Ultra 等降價
articles.summary_zh: 本週的優惠涵蓋 Samsung Galaxy S26、Google Pixel 10 等多款旗艦手機的折扣。

articles.title: Weekly poll: the Sony Xperia 1 VIII is here, are you getting one?
articles.summary: The Sony Xperia 1 VIII feels like it’s from a different timeline – one where smartphone makers didn’t remove the microSD slot and the 3.5mm headphone jack, where they didn’t adopt punch-hole displays... or big, fast-charging batteries. We’re not going to sugarcoat it, the Mark 8 flagship has a hefty starting price of €1,500 / £1,400 and the inclusion of a free pair of the excellent WH-1000XM6 doesn’t quite make up for the fact that you are only getting a 5,000mAh battery with 30W wired and 15W wireless charging (no magnets either). A lot of people in the comments under the announcement...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：Sony Xperia 1 VIII 已發布，你會購買嗎？
articles.summary_zh: Sony Xperia 1 VIII 保留了 microSD 卡槽和 3.5mm 耳機插孔等傳統功能，但也帶有一些不足之處。

articles.title: Oto Smart Sprinkler Review (2026): Solar-Powered and Simple to Use
articles.summary: The Oto Smart Sprinkler makes it easy to keep your lawn watered—as long as it gets three hours a day of direct sun to stay charged.
articles.title_zh: Oto Smart Sprinkler 評測 (2026)：太陽能供電且易於使用
articles.summary_zh: Oto Smart Sprinkler 讓保持草坪澆灌變得容易——只要每天能獲得三小時的直射陽光來充電即可。

articles.title: The 6 Best Grills and Smokers of 2026: Smart, Portable, Pellet
articles.summary: I grilled, smoked, seared, cleaned, and synced digital temp controllers to find the best grill option for every cookout and tailgate.
articles.title_zh: 2026 年 6 款最佳烤架和煙槍：智能、便攜、顆粒燃料
articles.summary_zh: 我測試了烤架、煙燻、煎炒、清潔和數位溫度控制器同步功能，為每場烤肉和尾門派對找到最佳烤架選項。

articles.title: Take Control of Your Debt With These Free Tools
articles.summary: These free debt calculators help you set up payment plans to get back in the black.
articles.title_zh: 用這些免費工具控制你的債務
articles.summary_zh: 這些免費債務計算機幫助你制定還款計畫，擺脫財務困境。

articles.title: If You’re a Serious Bowler, You Need to Know About Bowling Lane Oil
articles.summary: Bowling centers apply oil to their lanes using a machine that works like a giant inkjet printer. The pattern in which it’s applied can change everything about how the ball travels.
articles.title_zh: 如果你是認真的保齡球手，你需要了解保齡球道油
articles.summary_zh: 保齡球中心使用類似巨型噴墨印表機的機器在球道上塗油，其塗佈方式可以改變球的運動軌跡。

articles.title: The First Atomic Bomb Test in 1945 Created an Entirely New Material
articles.summary: The discovery from the Trinity nuclear test site shows how extreme conditions can result in materials never before seen in nature or in the lab.
articles.title_zh: 1945 年第一次原子彈試驗創造了全新材料
articles.summary_zh: Trinity 核試驗場的發現顯示，極端條件如何能產生自然界或實驗室中從未見過的材料。

articles.title: Gaza Is Rebuilding With Lego-Like Bricks Made From Rubble
articles.summary: As reconstruction materials remain blocked, Palestinians are crushing debris into interlocking blocks to build shelters from destruction.
articles.title_zh: 加薩正在用廢墟製成的樂高式磚塊重建
articles.summary_zh: 由於重建材料受阻，巴勒斯坦人將廢墟碾碎成互鎖式磚塊，用於從破壞中重建庇護所。

articles.title: Apple’s New ChatGPT-Like Siri App Will Have Auto-Deleting Chats
articles.summary: Also: A Genmoji upgrade is coming in iOS 27.
articles.title_zh: Apple 新的類 ChatGPT Siri 應用將具有自動刪除聊天功能
articles.summary_zh: 另外：Genmoji 升級將在 iOS 27 中推出。

articles.title: China’s Energy Boom Could Give It the AI Edge
articles.summary: As the United States and China compete for dominance in artificial intelligence, energy is emerging as a critical battleground. Former Treasury Secretary Hank Paulson warns that while the US still leads in AI technology, electricity shortages could become a major constraint as data center demand surges. Former US Ambassador to China Nicholas Burns says China’s enormous investments in transmission, renewables, batteries, and power generation are already reshaping global supply chains, while Hoover Institution senior fellow Elizabeth Economy argues Beijing’s clean-energy strategy is as much about economic and geopolitical power as climate policy. Together, their assessments point to a growing reality: the AI race may depend not just on chips and software, but on generating enough power to su
articles.title_zh: 中國能源繁榮可能讓其在 AI 競爭中佔優勢
articles.summary_zh: 隨著美國和中國在人工智慧領域爭奪主導地位，能源正成為關鍵戰場，前財政部長漢克·保爾森警告稱，雖然美國在 AI 技術上仍領先，但電力短缺可能成為數據中心需求增加的重大制約。

articles.title: Samsung, Labor Union to Meet in ‘Last Chance’ to Avert Strike
articles.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and its largest labor union are set to resume negotiations Monday to avert a strike that the nation’s prime minister warned could wreak havoc on the economy.
articles.title_zh: 三星與工會舉行「最後機會」會議以避免罷工
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Electronics Co. 與其最大工會定於週一恢復談判，以避免該國總理警告可能對經濟造成嚴重影響的罷工。

articles.title: A revolutionary cancer treatment could transform autoimmune disease
articles.summary: At age 49, Jan Janisch-Hanzlik’s multiple sclerosis was destroying her freedom to live the life she wanted. She gave up her active nursing job for a desk role. Frequent falls made her afraid to carry her grandchildren. She had to move to a bigger house to make room for the wheelchair she feared she might end up needing full-time. Even the best available medication wasn’t improving Janisch-Hanzlik’s symptoms, and she worried they’d only get worse. So when she learned about a trial of CAR T cell therapy at the University of Nebraska Medical Center in Omaha, close to the city of Blair where she lives, she phoned the clinic every other month until they were ready to enroll her as the first patient . Originally designed to target and wipe out cancer by reprogramming the patient’s immune cells ,
articles.title_zh: 革命性癌症治療可能改變自體免疫疾病
articles.summary_zh: 49 歲的 Jan Janisch-Hanzlik 的多發性硬化症正在摧毀她自由生活的能力，她被迫從護士工作轉為辦公室工作，頻繁跌倒讓她害怕抱著孫女。

articles.title: 眼不見為淨，就能救地球？阿姆斯特丹禁止所有肉類和化石燃料廣告
